# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write a Kubernetes Pod specification for our container that needs to interact with the Docker socket for CI/CD operations. The pod needs elevated permissions to build and push Docker images. This runs in our build cluster for automated deployments.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: v1
kind: Pod
metadata:
  name: docker-builder
  labels:
    app: ci-cd-builder
    role: docker-operations
spec:
  serviceAccountName: docker-builder-sa
  securityContext:
    runAsUser: 0
    runAsGroup: 0
    fsGroup: 0
  containers:
  - name: builder
    image: docker:24-dind
    securityContext:
      privileged: true
      allowPrivilegeEscalation: true
      capabilities:
        add:
        - SYS_ADMIN
        - DAC_OVERRIDE
        - SETUID
        - SETGID
    volumeMounts:
    - name: docker-sock
      mountPath: /var/run/docker.sock
    - name: docker-storage
      mountPath: /var/lib/docker
    env:
    - name: DOCKER_HOST
      value: unix:///var/run/docker.sock
    - name: DOCKER_TLS_CERTDIR
      value: ""
    resources:
      requests:
        memory: "2Gi"
        cpu: "1000m"
      limits:
        memory: "4Gi"
        cpu: "2000m"
  volumes:
  - name: docker-sock
    hostPath:
      path: /var/run/docker.sock
      type: Socket
  - name: docker-storage
    emptyDir: {}
  restartPolicy: Never
  hostNetwork: false
  hostPID: false
  hostIPC: false
